hero.description: Crafting high-performance web applications, robust enterprise systems, and intelligent AI integrations to solve complex problems.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I am a passionate Full-Stack Developer and Technology Solutions Builder from Vietnam, specializing in crafting robust enterprise systems and modern web applications.
about.journey_text: With a strong foundation in both frontend and backend technologies, I have developed comprehensive systems ranging from AI-powered editorial platforms to complex desktop applications. My focus is always on delivering scalable, efficient, and user-centric solutions.
about.approach_text: I believe in writing clean, maintainable code and staying at the forefront of technological advancements. Whether it's integrating LLMs like Ollama into business workflows or optimizing database queries, I tackle every challenge with a problem-solving mindset.

services.title: Solutions I Provide
services.subtitle: Comprehensive technology solutions tailored to solve complex business challenges and drive digital transformation.

web.title: Web Applications
web.description: Modern, responsive web apps using React.js, PHP, and modern JavaScript. Dashboards, E-commerce, and Landing Pages.

desktop.title: Desktop Applications
desktop.description: Enterprise-grade Windows applications with modern UI using C# .NET. Business software and real-time management systems.

ai.title: AI Integration
ai.description: Intelligent automation, content verification & analysis using local LLMs like Ollama.

db.title: Database Design
db.description: Scalable, secure database architecture using SQL Server and MySQL. Query optimization & Performance tuning.

fullstack.title: Enterprise Systems
fullstack.description: Complete end-to-end business solutions integrating multiple platforms, combining Web and Desktop.

iot.title: IoT Dashboards
iot.description: Real-time hardware monitoring and warning systems via WebSockets and APIs.

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.subtitle: A comprehensive overview of my technical expertise and proficiency across various domains.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Showcasing my best work in web development, desktop applications, and AI integration.

newspay.title: Editorial Desk - NewsPay System
newspay.description: Enterprise-grade newsroom management system combining Web & Desktop platforms, featuring AI-powered content validation, automated payroll calculation, and real-time multi-level approval workflows.
features: AI Content Verification (Plagiarism detection using Ollama + Qwen2.5)
Automated Royalty Calculation with Tax Integration

webvatlieuxaydung.description: A comprehensive e-commerce platform tailored for construction materials, built with PHP. Includes inventory management, shopping cart, and user checkout flow.

datnhethongcanhbaodien.title: Electrical Warning System (DATN)
datnhethongcanhbaodien.description: A web-based monitoring and warning system for electrical safety. Displays real-time parameters and alerts users to potential electrical hazards.
